glosses.vi: sự nghiêm khắc; sự nghiêm ngặt

sentences.target: On manque de rigueur en ce moment.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ mɑ̃k də ʁiɡœʁ ɑ̃ sə mɔmɑ̃/

translations.fr: On manque de rigueur en ce moment.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ mɑ̃k də ʁiɡœʁ ɑ̃ sə mɔmɑ̃/
translations.de: Uns fehlt gerade die nötige Sorgfalt.
translations.it: In questo momento ci manca rigore.
translations.vi: Hiện tại chúng ta thiếu sự chặt chẽ.
translations.ar: نفتقر إلى الصرامة في الوقت الحالي.
translations.nl: We missen op dit moment de nodige grondigheid.
translations.hu: Most hiányzik belőlünk a kellő alaposság.
translations.hi: अभी हममें कड़ाई की कमी है.
translations.el: Μας λείπει αυστηρότητα αυτή τη στιγμή.
translations.ro: Ne lipsește rigoarea în acest moment.
translations.ja: 今は厳密さが足りない。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun; in everyday French often means ‘we’. Triggers 3rd-person singular agreement on the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd-person singular, agreeing with ‘On’; means ‘to lack’.
Preposition introducing the complement/partitive noun phrase.
Common feminine noun; complement of the preposition ‘de’ (what is lacking).
Preposition starting the time adjunct ‘en ce moment’ (‘at the moment’).
Demonstrative determiner modifying ‘moment’; part of the fixed expression ‘en ce moment’.
Common masculine noun; head of the time expression ‘en ce moment’ functioning as an adverbial.

sentences.target: Tu fais preuve de rigueur au labo.
sentences.reading: /ty fɛ pʁœv də ʁiɡœʁ o labo/

translations.fr: Tu fais preuve de rigueur au labo.
translations.ipa: /ty fɛ pʁœv də ʁiɡœʁ o labo/
translations.en: You show rigor at the lab.
translations.vi: Bạn thể hiện sự tỉ mỉ trong phòng thí nghiệm.
translations.nl: In het lab toon je nauwkeurigheid.
translations.hi: तुम लैब में कड़ाई से काम करते हो.
translations.ro: La laborator dai dovadă de rigoare.
translations.ja: あなたは研究室で厳密さを発揮している。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; familiar register; controls 2sg verb agreement.
Present indicative, 2nd-person singular of ‘faire’; part of the idiom ‘faire preuve de’ meaning ‘to show/demonstrate’.
Common feminine noun used in the set phrase ‘faire preuve de’ (‘to show’).
Preposition linking ‘preuve’ to the quality being shown (‘rigueur’).
Noun naming the quality; complement of ‘de’ in the idiom.
Contraction of the preposition ‘à’ and the definite article ‘le’; introduces the locative complement.
Common masculine noun (colloquial for ‘laboratoire’); object of the preposition ‘au’ (location).

sentences.target: J'apprécie sa rigueur pendant nos révisions.

translations.fr: J'apprécie sa rigueur pendant nos révisions.
translations.en: I appreciate their rigor during our study sessions.
translations.es: Aprecio su rigor durante nuestras sesiones de estudio.
translations.de: Ich schätze die Gründlichkeit während unserer Lernsitzungen.
translations.it: Apprezzo il suo rigore durante le nostre sessioni di studio.
translations.ko: 우리 공부 시간에 그 사람의 철저함을 높이 평가해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我欣赏他在我们复习时的严谨。
translations.yue: 我欣賞佢喺我哋溫習時嘅嚴謹。
translations.ru: Я ценю строгость во время наших занятий.
translations.pt: Aprecio o rigor durante as nossas sessões de estudo.
translations.he: אני מעריך את הקפדנות במהלך מפגשי הלימוד שלנו.
translations.tr: Çalışma seanslarımız sırasında onun titizliğini takdir ediyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi trân trọng sự chặt chẽ của người ấy trong các buổi ôn tập của chúng ta.
translations.ar: أنا أقدّر الصرامة أثناء جلسات المذاكرة لدينا.
translations.nl: Ik waardeer de grondigheid tijdens onze leersessies.
translations.uk: Я ціную ретельність під час наших занять.
translations.hu: Értékelem az alaposságot a közös tanulásaink során.
translations.hi: हमारी पढ़ाई के दौरान मैं उनकी सख्ती की सराहना करता हूँ.
translations.el: Εκτιμώ την αυστηρότητα κατά τη διάρκεια των επαναλήψεών μας.
translations.nb: Jeg setter pris på grundigheten under våre lesestunder.
translations.id: Saya menghargai ketelitian selama sesi belajar kita.
translations.sv: Jag uppskattar noggrannheten under våra studietillfällen.
translations.ro: Apreciez rigoarea în timpul sesiunilor noastre de studiu.
translations.cs: Vážím si důslednosti během našich příprav.
translations.da: Jeg værdsætter grundigheden under vores læsesessioner.
translations.ja: 勉強会での厳密さを評価している。

tokens.explanation: Main verb in present indicative, 1st-person singular; ‘j’’ is the elided clitic subject pronoun ‘je’ attached before a vowel.
3rd-person possessive determiner, feminine singular agreeing with ‘rigueur’; marks possession.
Direct object of the verb; abstract feminine noun.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
1st-person plural possessive determiner, plural form agreeing with ‘révisions’.
Common feminine noun in the plural; object of ‘pendant’; refers to review/study periods.

sentences.target: Il faut plus de rigueur en cuisine.
sentences.reading: /il fo ply də ʁiɡœʁ ɑ̃ kɥizin/

translations.fr: Il faut plus de rigueur en cuisine.
translations.ipa: /il fo ply də ʁiɡœʁ ɑ̃ kɥizin/
translations.en: We need more rigor in the kitchen.
translations.es: Hace falta más rigor en la cocina.
translations.de: In der Küche braucht es mehr Sorgfalt.
translations.zh-Hans: 厨房里需要更多的严谨。
translations.yue: 廚房入面需要更多嚴謹。
translations.pt: Na cozinha é preciso mais rigor.
translations.vi: Trong bếp cần nhiều sự chặt chẽ hơn.
translations.ar: نحتاج إلى مزيد من الصرامة في المطبخ.
translations.nl: In de keuken is meer nauwkeurigheid nodig.
translations.hu: A konyhában több alaposságra van szükség.
translations.hi: रसोई में अधिक कड़ाई की जरूरत है.
translations.nb: På kjøkkenet trengs det mer нøyaktighet.
translations.id: Di dapur dibutuhkan lebih banyak ketelitian.
translations.ro: În bucătărie este nevoie de mai multă rigoare.
translations.cs: V kuchyni je potřeba více důslednosti.
translations.da: I køkkenet er der brug for mere grundighed.
translations.ja: キッチンではもっと厳密さが必要だ。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/expletive subject pronoun used with ‘falloir’; does not refer to a specific entity.
Impersonal verb in present indicative, 3rd-person singular; expresses necessity.
Degree adverb functioning as a quantifier in the construction ‘plus de + noun’ (‘more of’).
Preposition used with the quantifier ‘plus’ to introduce the quantified noun.
Noun; complement of the quantifier ‘plus de’ (what is needed more).
Preposition introducing a domain/context complement.
Common feminine noun; object of ‘en’ indicating the domain (‘in cooking’/‘in the kitchen’).
